summary: P1 AI Replay Analysis feature VERIFIED: Backend API and Frontend UI both working correctly. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI shows AI Analysis panel with Risk Peak, Response Time, Incidents, and Recommendations cards.

TestReplayAnalysisAPI.test_analysis_has_risk_analysis_structur: PASS - Returns peak_score, peak_level, peak_factors, risk_timeline, session_risk_level
TestReplayAnalysisAPI.test_analysis_has_response_times_structu: PASS - Returns incidents_count, avg_acknowledgement_s, avg_dispatch_s, avg_resolution_s, incidents
TestReplayAnalysisAPI.test_analysis_has_recommendations: PASS - Returns recommendations array with at least one recommendation

TestReplayAnalysisWithDifferentSessions.test_analysis_for_high_risk_session: PASS - HIGH risk sessions return session_risk_level=HIGH

sessions_list_page.sessions_displayed: PASS - 30 sessions displayed with risk levels (HIGH/SAFE/LOW)

replay_player_page.map_displayed: PASS - Map with journey trail and markers

ai_analysis_panel.ai_analysis_content: PASS - data-testid='ai-analysis-content' loaded after API call
ai_analysis_panel.risk_peak_card: PASS - data-testid='risk-peak-card' shows score (1.1), level (SAFE), time (04:08 PM)
ai_analysis_panel.response_time_card: PASS - data-testid='response-time-card' shows avg dispatch delay

critical_code_review_comments: Backend replay.py Lines 329-534: Analysis endpoint correctly computes risk peaks from GuardianRiskScore table, calculates response times from incidents, identifies preventable moments, and generates recommendations
Frontend JourneyReplayPage.jsx Lines 70-220: AIAnalysisPanel component correctly fetches /replay/{sessionId}/analysis and displays all analysis data
Auto-show on playback end: Lines 381-385 setShowAnalysis(true) when currentIdx reaches events.length-1
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 AI Replay Analysis feature is complete and working. The /replay page shows guardian sessions list. Clicking a session opens the replay player with map and event timeline. The 'AI Analysis' button in header opens analysis overlay showing: Risk Peak (score/level/time), Response Time (avg dispatch), Incidents count, Preventable Moments (if any), and Recommendations. Panel auto-shows when replay reaches end. Backend endpoint GET /api/replay/{session_id}/analysis computes analysis from GuardianRiskScore and Incident tables.
verified_features: GET /api/replay/sessions - Lists guardian sessions for replay
GET /api/replay/{session_id} - Returns session events for replay player
GET /api/replay/{session_id}/analysis - Returns AI analysis with risk_analysis, response_times, preventable_moments, recommendations
Frontend /replay - Sessions list page loads correctly
Frontend /replay/{id} - Replay player with map, timeline, controls
AI Analysis button visible in replay header
AI Analysis panel opens as overlay with loading state
Risk Peak card shows score, level, timestamp
Response Time card shows avg dispatch delay
Incidents Count card shows count and session duration
Auto-show analysis when playback reaches end
